analysis_commentary: IMPROVED, major primary-metric win. illegal_mass_min=0.0850 — 70% reduction from prior best 0.2886, and sustained through end of run (im_fin=0.0850). max_prob=0.8393 elevated but below 0.90 goal threshold, no collapse. above_uniform dropped 8→4 peak, 7→1 final. Trading broader above-uniform representation for a much tighter legal-mass concentration — primary goal metric improved dramatically. No promotion.
